---
title: "x8_methods analysis"
output: html_document
---

# load data
```{r}
librarian::shelf(tidyverse, here)

run_dir_methods = here("16S_sequence_processing", "runs", "methods_2026-03-13")

data_combined = read.csv(here(run_dir_methods, "12S", "output", paste0(config_12s$run$name, "_08_asv_controlled.csv")))
```

# aggregate by sample
```{r}
# summary stats for samples (ignoring controls)
sample_taxa_count = data_combined %>%
  # drop all controls
  filter(is.na(control_type)) %>%
  group_by(sample_id,
           gene,
           filter_size_um_rz,
           passive_active_rz,
           crispr,
           block,
           extraction_type,
           control_type) %>%
  summarize(
    # number of ASVs (before controls)
    n_asv = sum(detected),
    # number of ASVs (after controls)
    n_asv_controlled = sum(detected_controlled),
    # number of ASVs classified
    n_asv_controlled_class = sum(detected_controlled & !is.na(taxonomic_level)),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians
    n_asv_controlled_class_amph = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia")),
    # number of ASVs classified as amphibians to the species level
    n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp = sum(detected_controlled & (class == "Amphibia") & (taxonomic_level == "species")),
    .groups = "drop")

# pivot longer for plotting
sample_taxa_control_count_long = sample_taxa_control_count %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_asv,
                        n_asv_controlled,
                        n_asv_controlled_class,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_amph,
                        n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp),
               names_to = "count_type",
               values_to = "n")

# gene
ggplot(sample_taxa_control_count_long, aes(x = gene, y = n, color = count_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  ylim(0, 15)

# 16s pore size active passive
ggplot(sample_taxa_control_count %>%
         filter(gene == "16S"), aes(x = passive_active_rz, y = n_asv_controlled_class_amph_spp, color = filter_size_um_rz)) +
  geom_boxplot()

```
